// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Hyble
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{


    [StructLayout(LayoutKind.Auto)]
    private struct E
    {
        internal int Key;
        internal int Value;

        internal E(int key, int value)
        {
            Key = key;
            Value = value;
        }
    }

    private static readonly E[] _entries = {
        new E(1, 1), new E(1, 1), new E(2, 2), new E(3, 3)
    };

    private static readonly ushort[] _displacements = {
        0
    };

    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    private static uint Reduce64(ulong hash, uint range)
    {
#if NET5_0_OR_GREATER
        return (uint)Math.BigMul(hash, range, out _);
#else
        ulong lo = (uint)hash;
        ulong hi = hash >> 32;
        ulong loProduct = lo * range;
        ulong hiProduct = hi * range;
        ulong carry = (loProduct >> 32) + (uint)hiProduct;
        return (uint)((carry >> 32) + (hiProduct >> 32));
#endif
    }

    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    private static ulong Hash(int value)
    {
        return (ulong)value;
    }

    
    public static bool Contains(int key)
    {


        ulong hash = unchecked(Hash(key) * 5871781006564002453UL);
        uint approx = Reduce64(hash, 4U);
        int bucket = (int)(hash & 0UL);
        int index = (int)(approx + _displacements[bucket]);
        ref var entry = ref _entries[index];

        return key == entry.Key;
    }

    
    public static bool TryLookup(int key, out int value)
    {


        ulong hash = unchecked(Hash(key) * 5871781006564002453UL);
        uint approx = Reduce64(hash, 4U);
        int bucket = (int)(hash & 0UL);
        int index = (int)(approx + _displacements[bucket]);
        ref E entry = ref _entries[index];

        if (key == entry.Key)
        {
            value = entry.Value;
            return true;
        }

        value = default;
        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 3;
    public const int MinKey = 1;
    public const int MaxKey = 3;
}
